30% increased Spell Damage (rune)

Grants Skill: Level 19 Chaos Bolt

{ Prefix Modifier "Glyphic" (Tier: 2) — Damage, Caster }
94(90-104)% increased Spell Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Vile" (Tier: 3) — Damage, Chaos }
80(75-89)% increased Chaos Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Stormbound" (Tier: 1) — Damage, Elemental, Lightning }
Gain 30(28-30)% of Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Philosopher" (Tier: 4) — Attribute }
+24(21-24) to Intelligence
{ Suffix Modifier "of Bliss" (Tier: 3) — Mana }
49(40-49)% increased Mana Regeneration Rate
{ Suffix Modifier "of Consumption" (Tier: 4) — Mana }
Gain 19(15-20) Mana per enemy killed
